scripts.sync: npm run check && npm run icons && npm run assets && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:android: npm run sync && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run sync && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:android:debug: npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:android:release: npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:ios: npm run sync:ios && echo Build iOS on macOS: npx cap open ios
